ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (asset) -> { id: asset.Id, name: asset.Name, category: asset.Category__c default "General", manufacturer: asset.Manufacturer__c default "", serialNumber: asset.Serial_Number__c default "", warrantyStartDate: asset.Warranty_Start_Date__c, warrantyEndDate: asset.Warranty_End_Date__c, warrantyStatus: asset.Warranty_Status__c default "Unknown", installDate: asset.InstallDate, status: asset.Status default "Active" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var asset = payload[0] --- { id: asset.Id, name: asset.Name, category: asset.Category__c default "General", manufacturer: asset.Manufacturer__c default "", serialNumber: asset.Serial_Number__c default "", description: asset.Description default "", warrantyStartDate: asset.Warranty_Start_Date__c, warrantyEndDate: asset.Warranty_End_Date__c, warrantyStatus: asset.Warranty_Status__c default "Unknown", installDate: asset.InstallDate, status: asset.Status default "Active", unitId: asset.Unit__c, unitNumber: asset.Unit__r.Unit_Number__c default "" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var asset = payload[0] --- { startDate: asset.Warranty_Start_Date__c, endDate: asset.Warranty_End_Date__c, status: asset.Warranty_Status__c default "Unknown", provider: asset.Manufacturer__c default "Unknown", terms: "Manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Contact " ++ (asset.Manufacturer__c default "manufacturer") ++ " for claims." }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (wo) -> { id: wo.Id, workOrderNumber: wo.WorkOrderNumber, subject: wo.Subject default "", description: wo.Description default "", status: wo.Status, priority: wo.Priority default "Medium", scheduledStart: wo.StartDate, scheduledEnd: wo.EndDate, completedDate: wo.EndDate, technicianName: wo.Owner.Name default "Unassigned" }
